rules.name: Astral Core Near Breakpoint Priority
rules.description: Astral Core can be valuable when it helps reach an SS gear or astral forge breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact breakpoint values are provided. Missing source metadata from AI output.

rules.name: Xeno Core Long-Term Breakpoint Priority
rules.description: Xeno Core is usually more valuable long-term when the player is close to a Xeno awakening breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact awakening breakpoint values are provided. Missing source metadata from AI output.

rules.name: Resonance Chip Lower Without Breakpoint
rules.description: Resonance Chip may be weaker if it does not unlock a major breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact resonance breakpoint values are provided. Missing source metadata from AI output.

rules.name: Rule: Breakpoint
rules.notes: Heuristic rule extracted from trigger wording. Review before treating as final balance guidance.

rules.name: Rule: Breakpoint

rules.name: Rule: Not Worth
rules.description: Disclaimer: Since Y5 to R5 takes 280 crystals, your average for all 5 levels is ~36.5 so it's not worth the R1-R3 at lesser rates to get the 62.5 when you have much
rules.notes: Heuristic rule extracted from trigger wording. Review before treating as final balance guidance.

rules.name: Pet Awakening Priority
rules.description: The explanation recommends taking Rex to R5, then Croaky to R5, before bringing other pets to Y5.
rules.notes: Build-specific recommendation; keep exploration and verify against primary pet guides.

pets.notes: Exact skill values need primary-guide verification.

pet_awakenings.description: Awakening-crystal costs from Y1 through R5 total 350: 5, 5, 10, 20, 30, 40, then 60 for each R2-R5 step.
pet_awakenings.notes: Explanation-derived table; verify against Pet_Awakening_Costs_and_Toy_Bonuses before confirmed.

tech_resonance_costs.name: Resonance Energy Tier Costs
tech_resonance_costs.description: Resonance energy by tech tier: Y 50, Y+1 100, Y+2 150, Y+3 200, R 300, R+1 400, R+2 550, R+3 700, R+4 850, Rainbow 1000.
tech_resonance_costs.notes: Explanation-derived table; verify against the named resonance guide before confirmed.

tech_resonance_costs.name: Resonance Chip Multiplier Costs
tech_resonance_costs.description: Successive multiplier levels cost 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 5, 7, 9, 12, and 15 resonance chips, totaling 60.
tech_resonance_costs.notes: Explanation-derived table; exact level labels need primary-guide verification.

survivors.name: Raphael
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor focused on Sai, Bleed, Laceration, and damage to Lacerated targets.
survivors.notes: Explanation-derived from Survivors_SP_2025-01-26; verify against the named guide before confirmed.

survivors.name: Leonardo
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor focused on Laceration uptime, duration, and Whirlwind Slash.
survivors.notes: Explanation-derived from Survivors_SP_2025-01-26; verify against the named guide before confirmed.

survivors.name: Donatello
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor whose Brotherhood passive scales with equipped SP awakening passives.
survivors.notes: Explanation-derived from Survivors_SP_2025-01-26; Brotherhood requires build-synergy modeling.

survivors.name: Michelangelo
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor focused on hit-triggered windstorms, Bleed, Laceration, and Lacerated-target damage.
survivors.notes: Explanation-derived from Survivors_SP_2025-01-26; verify against the named guide before confirmed.

survivors.name: April
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor connecting Vulnerability with deployed-pet attack scaling.
survivors.notes: Pet HP is stored but ignored by damage-first scoring.

survivors.name: Splinter
survivors.description: TMNT SP survivor focused on pet crit rate, pet crit damage, and pet skill cooldown.
survivors.notes: Explanation-derived from Survivors_SP_2025-01-26; verify against the named guide before confirmed.

survivor_awakenings.name: Donatello Brotherhood A1
survivor_awakenings.description: Global passive: Crit Rate +3% per equipped SP-grade survivor awakening passive.
survivor_awakenings.notes: Cannot be equipped in Teamwork passive slots.

survivor_awakenings.name: Donatello Brotherhood A2
survivor_awakenings.description: Skill Damage and Crit Damage +3% per equipped SP awakening passive.

survivor_awakenings.name: Splinter Master Mentor A1
survivor_awakenings.description: Equipped pet skill cooldown -5% and Pet Crit Rate +10%.
survivor_awakenings.notes: Damage value depends on deployed pet contribution.

survivor_awakenings.name: SP Teamwork Passive Slots
survivor_awakenings.description: Most listed SP survivors unlock one Teamwork Passive Slot at A4 and another at A6.
survivor_awakenings.notes: Apply only to survivors whose source explicitly shows these slots.

crit_stats.name: SP Y5 Global Crit Milestone
crit_stats.description: Each documented TMNT SP survivor gives All Survivors Crit Rate +8% at five yellow stars.
crit_stats.notes: Apply once per eligible survivor milestone; verify against the named survivor guide.

crit_stats.name: SS Belt Crit Thresholds
crit_stats.description: SS belt conditional bonuses trigger above 100%, 130%, and 150% Crit Rate.
crit_stats.notes: Threshold wording is strictly above, not greater-than-or-equal; verify against SS gear guide.

clan_shop.name: Clan Shop Catalog (Needs Review)
clan_shop.description: The explanation confirms a clan-currency shop with multiple item categories, but its icon-only table does not reliably map item names to costs.
clan_shop.notes: Coverage marker only. Do not generate purchase candidates until names, currencies, and row-to-cost mappings are verified.
